issue.title: ci: avoid release signing in PR build checks

comment.body:
> I suppose we also need to make corresponding changes to automated-release.yml. Or am I missing something?

@GeorgeChernyshov 
I thought you included those changes in your PR? If not, that was my expectation as it relates specifically to your milestone. 

The changes here are just to fix the build test failure on your PR. (With side effects of potentially speeding up the build test workflow as well). We don't need to test signing release builds with every PR, we're just looking to catch build/compile errors in the code. 

Let me know if I've misunderstood something though.
